ideation: This sequence shows the robot gently cradling a seedling, representing care and nurturing.  The movement starts with arms at the sides, then moves to a gentle cradle, and finally returns to a relaxed state. The slow, deliberate movements emphasize the delicate nature of the seedling.  The use of both arms in a symmetrical pose enhances the sense of protection and care.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready to receive
arms gently lift and curve inward, holding something precious
the seedling is cradled softly between the hands
the seedling is held with utmost care and tenderness
arms return to rest, the seedling is safe
